key_themes: 光子/光学瓶颈（CPO、CW激光器、InP基板）
人形机器人/物理AI商业化
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 从早期更偏向光子学叙事，近期转向更强调人形机器人和内存的长期结构性机遇，并认为短期市场回调是机会。
representative_quotes: Felt very weird to see a profitable company get dragged down after earnings. But in hindsight, given the increase hyperscaler capex, the drop felt more like it's more relative opportunity cost more than fundamentals?

I'm convinced if Agility raised a very small private round at $39B as well from $2.5B (which it definitely could), to set a valuation anchor. Investors would be foaming in the mouth for a private allocation, just due to psychology rather than underlying fundamentals.

If my personal thesis is correct though, many of these names will have a major inflection point in midway through 2027 scaling up to 2028. Markets don't typically wait to price things in advance, but some ideas might be a tad early or in the buildout given it's H2 2026 now.

key_themes: AI投资风险与回报不确定性
宏观经济疲软与地缘政治紧张
unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期观点从对AI和科技股的乐观转为关注风险，更多强调经济下行和股市泡沫警告。
representative_quotes: Short sellers are getting wiped out. "Those poor bastards. I never liked short guys because they're betting against the country."
Michael Burry has said that stocks will crash and rallies won't last, with the end being "nigh."
Gold has overtaken US government bonds as the world’s top reserve asset, per ECB

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期关注焦点从存储扩展到设备材料，特别是康宁的玻璃基板和光纤概念，同时强调规避杠杆风险
representative_quotes: 存储三家海力士三星美光合起来市值应该要比英伟达值钱。三家可以不造hbm直接卖dram，但英伟达不买hbm，营收就归零了。
康宁在玻璃这一块有无与伦比的话语权。英伟达让康宁扩产10倍，在投产后说明康宁业绩也要10倍涨幅！
要么早信要么坚决不信，先信卖后信。每次下撤暴跌亏惨的要么是信最晚的，要么是杠杆打满的。
